title: SitEverywhere
description: All in one sit plugin for 1.8.x - 1.21.x
body:
🪑 **Sit Everywhere - The Ultimate Sitting Plugin!**
Tired of standing all day after hours of mining and building? Sit Everywhere is a lightweight, fun, and highly compatible plugin that allows your players to sit down almost anywhere they want! Bring a new level of roleplay and interaction to your server.

✨ **Features**
- 🧱 **Sit on Blocks:** Simply right-click any stair, slab, or carpet with an empty hand to take a seat. Perfect for decorating your builds and creating social hubs!
  
- 🧑‍🤝‍🧑 **Sit on Players:** Want a better view? Just right-click another player to hop on their shoulders for a fun ride. The player you're sitting on can walk around, and you'll move with them!
  
- **/sit Command:** Can't find a suitable block? No problem! Use the /sit command to sit down right where you are standing.
  
- 👟 **Easy Dismount:** To stand up from any seated position, players just need to press their sneak key (usually Shift). It's simple and intuitive!
  
- ⚙️ **Highly Compatible:** This version is built to work flawlessly on modern Minecraft servers, supporting versions from 1.11 all the way to 1.21+.
  
 💻 **Commands & Permissions**
 Control exactly who can use the sitting features with these simple permissions.

- /sit
 
- Description: Allows a player to sit down on the ground at their current location.
 
- Permission: **siteverywhere.sit**
 
 **Sit on Blocks**
 
- Description: Allows a player to right-click stairs, slabs, and carpets to sit.
 
- Permission: **siteverywhere.block**
 
 **Sit on Players**
 
- Description: Allows a player to right-click another player to sit on their shoulders.
 
- Permission: **siteverywhere.player**

Give your players the ability to relax and interact with the world in a whole new way. Download Sit Everywhere today!

✨ **Check Out Our Other Plugins!** ✨ If you enjoy the **SitEverywhere** plugin, don't forget to check out our other high-quality plugins for your server!

- **BuildByBit:** https://builtbybit.com/creators/fisfiskoray.600970
- **PolyMart:** https://polymart.org/user/57522/fisfiskoray
- **Modrinth:** https://modrinth.com/user/FisFisKoray
